summary:
The primary focus should not include extensive details about various studies but rather highlight core aspects directly related to answering why one condition stands apart regarding its association with escitalopram use compared against others typically reported for this medication; hence:

The main point here revolves around identifying how sialorrhea uniquely distinguishes itself due to lower documented prevalence specifically linked back solely towards escitalopram without significant
